---
title: "Programming Practice: Lab 10"
execute:
  enabled: true
  echo: false
  cache: true
format:
  html:
    code-fold: false
jupyter: python3
diagram:
  cache: true
  cache-dir: ./cache
  engine:
    tikz:
      execpath: lualatex
filters:
  - diagram
---

# Concurrency and parallelism

Multithreading: <https://docs.python.org/3/library/threading.html>

Multiprocessing: <https://docs.python.org/3/library/multiprocessing.html>

## Exercises

1. Write multithreaded and multiprocess versions of image processing code and compare performance.
